name: ethernetPacket::SetVlan
title: ethernetPacket::SetVlan
syntax: long ethernetPacket.SetVlan(dword vlanIndex, word tpid,word tci); // form 2
description: Sets the VLAN tag of an Ethernet packet. If the packets does not contain a VLAN tag, a new VLAN tag is added.
For double-tagged VLAN form 2 can be used.

parameters.name: vlanIndex
parameters.description: Index of the VLAN tag for double-tagged VLANs. Index 0 is the inner VLAN, index 1 the outer VLAN.Range: 0..2

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
